{{Quote|No one knows what Cragus 12's name means. Those who ask him usually end up dead or, if they're lucky, seriously injured.|[[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]]|<ref name="WBC1" />}}
The mysterious [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] '''Cragus 12''' was wanted by [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] for murder of New Republic personnel and destruction of New Republic property, as well as theft. Many considered [[Gender/Legends|him]] as mysterious as he was dangerous.

==Biography==
The [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] Cragus 12 was considered to be a mystery. His origins and the reasoning for naming himself Cragus 12 were unknown, but he worked for a variety of employers including individuals, organizations and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Rumors regarding Cragus 12's origins included the speculation that he was either a [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] or a [[Droid/Legends|droid]]. He worked primarily in the border region between Imperial and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] space during the early years of the New Republic, and was known for his upfront and openly violent methods of capturing a target. Unafraid of causing a commotion, Cragus 12 would often inflict thousands of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] worth of property damage, but would leave non-targets unharmed. He flew the [[Kazellis-class light freighter]] [[The Claw (Kazellis-class)|''The Claw'']], and was accompanied by his [[Security droid/Legends|security droid]] [[GX-99]].<ref name="WBC1" />

During the early years of the New Republic, Cragus 12 was wanted by the [[New Republic Intelligence Service]] for the [[Death/Legends|murder]] of New Republic personnel, and the destruction of New Republic property. The reward for his capture was 50,000 credits.<ref name="WBC1" />

==Personality and traits==
Cragus 12 was a violent and intimidating individual, who was known to kill or injure those who asked him about his name. Well trained in many forms of weaponry and combat, Cragus 12 was able to use a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]], and was exceptionally skilled with the arm-mounted [[Repeating blaster/Legends|repeating blaster]]. He was trained in [[Unarmed combat/Legends|unarmed]] and [[Melee weapon/Legends|melee combat]], and could throw [[Grenade/Legends|grenades]] and operate [[Missile/Legends|missile]] weapons and vehicle-mounted weapons. He was familiar with [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Species/Legends|species]], cultures, languages and [[Star system/Legends|planetary systems]], and was trained in survival techniques. Cragus 12 was a skilled forger, a keen investigator and was able to bargain or con an individual if the situation arose. He was also a known [[Gambling/Legends|gambler]].<ref name="WBC1" />

Technically minded, Cragus 12 could [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] space [[Transport/Legends|transports]] and [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] [[Astrogation/Legends|through]] [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], and operate communications, [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] and security equipment. He could also man the weapons and shields station on transports, and operate [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicles and [[Jetpack/Legends|jetpacks]]. Cragus 12 could repair armor, blasters, repulsolift vehicles, and space transports and their weaponry. He was also able to program and repair [[Computer/Legends|computers]] and [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. Cragus 12 was also well versed in the application of first aid and the science of [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborging]].<ref name="WBC1" />

==Equipment==
Cragus 12 employed a customised set of [[Cragus 12's bounty hunter armor|full-body battle armor]] with a helmet that concealed his face. A jet pack allowed for fast travel, and the suit contained a [[Multi-Frequency Targeting and Acquisition System/Legends|Multi-Frequency Targeting and Acquisition System]]. Cragus 12 was also outfitted with extensive [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetics]], including a cyberarm that replaced his right arm. He could exchange the hand for a [[Repeating blaster/Legends|repeating blaster]]. Apart from the cyberarm, his cybernetic improvements included a [[Hifold Sensory Package]] and a [[Cardio-Muscular Package]] both manufactured by [[Neuro-Saav Corporation]]. He also carried a [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]], [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]], grenades, [[Medpac/Legends|medpac]], [[Syntherope/Legends|syntherope]] and a [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonator]].<ref name="WBC1" />
